name: Cypress Testing Framework
description: A testing framework for end-to-end testing of web applications using Cypress.

scripts.report:generate: marge cypress/reports/output.json --reportDir cypress/reports/html --inline --videoDir cypress/reports/videos && cp -R cypress/reports/videos cypress/reports/html/videos
scripts.test:report: npm run report:clean && npm run cy:run && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate

author: Douglas Panizza Cugliari dos Santos
